title: Monday API (via GPT) doesn't match my board and groups ids
excerpt:

posts.author: Maunissan (Mauro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m trying to automate a GPT to create tasks directly in Monday and every time I ask GPT to get me the name of the board, name of the board groups (and their ids), it returns something completely different from I can see in Monday.

GPT returns a list of group names and ids, and the board name is also different. I don’t know if the API is bugged or why is bringing me different values. Those groups are just not there.

Can someone help?

TYYY

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! Could you please describe how you’re using the Monday API with GPT? Are you working through the Chat interface or via the API?
